data.title: Investors of NASDAQ: METC advised by Berger Montague to take action before March 31, 2026 deadline due to class action lawsuit.
data.description: In Philadelphia on February 19, 2026, Berger Montague PC, a leading plaintiffs' law firm, disclosed the initiation of a class action lawsuit against Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC). This legal action represents investors who procured Ramaco securities during a specific period. The lawsuit aims to address grievances related to the company's conduct during this time frame. Ramaco Resources, Inc., identified by its NASDAQ symbol METC, is facing allegations regarding its securities transactions, with the lawsuit seeking to protect the interests of affected investors.

data.title: Borr Drilling Limited to present Q4 results on Feb 19, 2026, 09:00 New York time (15:00 CET) via webcast/conference call.
data.description: Borr Drilling Limited, based in Hamilton Bermuda, is set to reveal its fourth quarter results for 2025 via a webcast/conference call on February 19, 2026. The presentation is scheduled for 09:00 New York time (15:00 CET) on that day. To access the information and updates, participants are invited to join the event at the specified time.

data.title: AbbVie announces quarterly dividend of $1.73 per share, payable on May 15, 2026, to stockholders of record on April 15, 2026.
data.description: In North Chicago, Illinois, on February 19, 2026, the board of directors of AbbVie Inc. (NYSE: ABBV) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.73 per share. Stockholders of record as of April 15, 2026, will receive the dividend, which will be payable on May 15, 2026. This news highlights the company's commitment to providing value to its shareholders through regular dividend payments.

data.title: Aris Mining's common shares now trading on NYSE as "ARIS" in addition to TSX, following its uplisting from NYSE American.
data.description: Aris Mining Corporation (TSX: ARIS; NYSE: ARIS) has started trading its common shares on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "ARIS" after moving up from the NYSE American. The company's common shares will also remain listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as "ARIS", ensuring consistency in trading symbols on both exchanges. This significant development follows the uplisting and aims to enhance the company's visibility and accessibility to a broader range of investors.

data.title: Analog Devices (ADI) surpasses Q1 estimates with earnings of $2.46/share and revenue of $3.16 billion. Q2 revenue expected at $3.40-$3.60 billion, with adjusted EPS projected at $2.73-$3.03. CEO Vincent Roche praises strong start to fiscal year.
data.description: Analog Devices Inc (NASDAQ: ADI) recently released their first-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations and providing a positive outlook for the second quarter of the fiscal year. The company reported earnings of $2.46 per share for Q1, exceeding the anticipated $2.31 per share. Additionally, quarterly sales amounted to $3.160 billion, which was higher than the expected $3.117 billion by analysts. Looking ahead to Q2 of fiscal year 2026, Analog Devices anticipates revenue to fall within the range of $3.40 billion to $3.60 billion, surpassing the expected $3.23 billion. The company also projects adjusted EPS for the upcoming quarter to be between $2.73 and $3.03, which is higher than the analyst consensus estimate of $2.46. Vincent Roche, CEO and Chair of ADI, expressed confidence in the company's performance, stating, "ADI’s robust first quarter built upon the strong position and momentum with which we entered the year..." For more details, the full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Karooooo to present at Raymond James 27th Annual Institutional Investor Conference on March 4th at 4:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: Singapore-based company Karooooo (KARO) revealed that Richard Schubert, the Group Chief Operating Officer, and Paul Bieber, the Vice President of Investor Relations and Strategic Finance, will be attending the Raymond James 27th Annual Institutional Investor Conference in Orlando, FL on March 4th at 4:00 p.m. ET. The conference aims to showcase Karooooo's mobility and operational intelligence solutions, where a live webcast of the presentation will be accessible to viewers.

data.title: Mtn Dew Baja Blast named official MLB drink, new product program in 2026, Gatorade extends MLB partnership for 4 decades.
data.description: In an exciting announcement on February 19, 2026, Purchase, N.Y., Mountain Dew shared details about a forthcoming new product incentive program set to debut during the 2026 MLB season. Additionally, PepsiCo's Gatorade® has solidified their bond with MLB, extending their partnership for an impressive four decades. This news comes as Spring Training begins, hinting at a thrilling season ahead.

data.title: US travel agency air ticket sales hit $10B in Jan 2026, up 7% from Jan 2025, signaling strength in air travel.
data.description: A report released by Airlines Reporting Corp. (ARC) reveals a positive start for air travel in 2026, with U.S.-based travel agency air ticket sales hitting $10 billion in January. This marks a notable 7% increase compared to the same month in 2025. The data suggests a promising trend in the industry's recovery and indicates growing consumer confidence in travel.

data.title: 2025 sees boost in U.S. imports amid global trade changes post Trump-era tariffs. Record-high goods deficit while services surplus expands.
data.description: According to recent data released by the Census Bureau, the total trade deficit with the world decreased, primarily due to a growth in the trade surplus for services. However, there was a notable increase in the trade deficit for goods, which reached its highest recorded level.

data.title: Annual general meeting of shareholders of TKM Grupp AS on March 17, 2026, at Nordic Hotel Forum, Tallinn. Registry code 10223439.
data.description: TKM Grupp AS, with registration code 10223439 and headquarters at Kaubamaja 1, 10143, Tallinn, has scheduled its annual general meeting of shareholders for March 17, 2026, at 12 p.m. The meeting will take place at the Nordic Hotel Forum, located at Viru väljak 3, Tallinn.

data.title: Upgraded power grid in Berks County to benefit 6,000+ customers with new transmission substation and power line for improved reliability and economic growth.
data.description: A significant enhancement to the electrical grid in Reading, Pennsylvania is currently in progress, aiming to increase the supply of electricity in the area. This upgrade includes the construction of a new transmission substation and power line, which will not only strengthen the grid but also enable faster power restoration. The project is set to benefit over 6,000 customers of FirstEnergy in the region. The development is part of an initiative to improve infrastructure and bolster the economy by ensuring a more reliable and efficient power supply.

data.title: Alicia Halpin becomes President of NYC Disinfection Services, Inc., WBE certified, offers public-sector facility services.
data.description: In Whitestone, New York, on February 19, 2026, Alicia Halpin leads NYC Disinfection Services, Inc. This company is a certified Women-Owned Business Enterprise (WBE) in both New York State and New York City, offering public-sector facility services in NYC. Alicia's leadership has propelled the company to serve a significant number of public facilities in the city.

data.title: CPSC announced recalls of Meijer's Lullaby Lane and MCS children's sleepwear due to a burn hazard. More at www.cpsc.gov.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) released information regarding recent product recalls. Meijer has issued recalls for Lullaby Lane and MCS children's sleepwear due to a burn hazard, in violation of mandatory standards. Consumers are urged to visit www.cpsc.gov for more details on these recalls and to ensure their safety.
